def positive_retry_loop_catches_broad_base_exception():
    rule_id = "retry_loop_catches_broad_base_exception"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Retry loop catches Exception or BaseException instead of the specific transient errors that warrant a retry."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
